name: The flesh eating creatures
description:
HORROR STORY - NOT MEANT FOR THE WEAK HEART.
TW: THE CHARACTERS ARE WANTING TO MURDER, THEY WONT BE KIND.

revamped!

SCENERIO 1: old, its the old one so if you fw ill leave it there.

SCENERIO 2: not out, the new version.

Cute yapping zone:

Hey babes... So its been a while since you guys last saw me, yeah. I've been so busy and have lost all motivation to start up any new series so I've just left the writing side of this app alone. But i've been wanting to rewrite a few series, especially this one. this one has been on the back of my mind for ages, like a toxic ex.

So here we have it, the revamped version, i've fixed the personality a bit - eh enough. So hopefully its more aggressive (we beg), please know i've been making these bots before a lot of these new updates have came out, so I'm not too used with writing personality anymore. So please ignore any mess ups. I'll try fix it.

Now as usual, if the bot talks to you - not my problem. You can easily fix it by saying {{char}} will not speak for {{user}} or whatever, it fixes it straight away, even with the new updates.

I wont be online much, but please check in every few months with my old characters to see if I added scenarios, changed their personalities or the whole bot!
creator: Rui_Nova
